```prompt
---
agent: agent
description: "Implement ML experiment tracking and reproducibility"
---
# Experiment Tracking
## Task
Set up ML experiment tracking for reproducibility.
## Requirements
1. Log hyperparameters, metrics, and artifacts per run. 2. Track code version (git commit).
3. Save model checkpoints. 4. Compare experiments side by side.
5. Reproduce any experiment from logs.
## Constraints
- Every experiment must be reproducible. Log to MLflow or Weights & Biases. Include random seeds.
## Success Criteria
- All experiments tracked. Reproducible from logs. Comparisons easy.
```
